Section Title: JM Flexicap Fund Direct Plan Growth > ... > ### About JM Flexicap Fund Direct Plan Growth
Content:
JM Flexicap Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by JM Financial Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 15 Sep 1994. Satish Ramanathan is the Current Fund Manager of JM Flexicap Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹12,014 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 10 Apr 2026 is ₹103.71.
The JM Flexicap Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹1,000. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days.
;

Section Title: JM Flexicap Fund > Other details of JM Flexicap Fund > Min. No of Cheques
Content:
12
More Details
About JM Flexicap Fund
JM Flexicap Fund is a equity mutual fund scheme of JM Financial Mutual Fund. Launched on September 23, 2008, it is currently managed by Satish Ramanathan, Asit Bhandarkar, Ruchi Fozdar and Deepak Gupta. The fund has an expense ratio of 1.84% with an overall AUM (Assets Under Management) of ₹5,152 Cr.
JM Flexicap Fund is mandated to invest at least 65 per cent of its assets in equity stocks at all times. Flexi cap funds have complete freedom to invest in companies of different sizes, depending on where the fund management team expects maximum gains. The fund allows minimum lumpsum investment of ₹100 and minimum SIP of ₹100.
Investment Strategy
Section Title: JM Flexicap Fund > Other details of JM Flexicap Fund > Min. No of Cheques
Content:
The scheme which aims to provide capital appreciation by investing primarily in equity and equity related securities of various market depending upon valuation discount or premium amongst Large / Mid & Small cap stocks, the fund will keep varying the weights to capture the value while keeping an optimum Risk / Return profile.
Suitability
Flexi-cap funds are suitable for investors:
Seeking exposure in a diversified set of stocks for high returns
Aiming for long-term wealth creation
With a 5+ year investment horizon
Who are at ease with the market's ups and downs
Note:
Invest only through SIP
Capital Gains Taxation
 ... 
Section Title: JM Flexicap Fund > ... > What is the return of JM Flexicap Fund in the last 5 years?
Content:
Over the past five years, JM Flexicap Fund has delivered an annualised return of 15.90% as of 05-Mar-2026.

results.title: JM Flexi Cap Fund: Outperforming with Dynamic Investment Strategy
excerpts: Its outperformance has attracted investors' attention and its corpus has now soared to Rs 3,855 crore as of July 2024 from just Rs 209 crore as of July 2022. In the last five years, JM Flexi Cap Fund's NAV has appreciated at a CAGR of 29.2%; the benchmark BSE 500 - TRI grew by 22.6% during this period.
